S.FORM: Ernie Barrett sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1929, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 8, Ernie Barrett, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
